2004.issue: [E2004] Version "0.1.2" listed at common.news at [io-package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.smart-eq/blob/master/io-package.json) does not exist at [NPM](https://www.npmjs.com/package/iobroker.smart-eq). Please remove from news section.

2008.issue: [S2008] Version 0.1.1 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3012.issue: [S3012] "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" is not defined. Consider adding it for automated releases.

3032.issue: [W3032] Release 0.1.2 from [io-package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.smart-eq/blob/master/io-package.json)/package.json has not yet been tagged. Tagging releases is required.

3034.issue: [E3034] Release 0.1.1 tagged as "latest" at npm has not yet been tagged at GitHub. Tagging of releases is required.

4047.issue: [S4047] Adapter "smart-eq" is not yet available in the stable repository. Please consider adding it.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".
